# progress-bar

## Import

```typescript
import { ProgressBarComponent } from '@lucca-front/ng/progress-bar';
```

## API Reference

### ProgressBarComponent (component)

**Selector:** `lu-progress-bar`

#### Inputs

| Property | Binding name | Type | Default | Required | Transform | Description |
|----------|-------------|------|---------|----------|-----------|-------------|
| `value` | `value` | `number` | `0` | — | `numberAttribute` | — |
| `state` | `state` | `'success' \| 'error' \| 'null'` | `null` | — | — | — |
| `indeterminate` | `indeterminate` | `boolean` | `false` | — | `booleanAttribute` | — |
